stories.headline: 'The Real L Word' Star Francine Beppu's Cause of Death Revealed - TMZ
stories.summary: Francine Beppu died by suicide … TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: Summer House The Aftermath: West and Amanda's Reunion and Ciara's Future - Variety
stories.summary: Bravo's "Summer House" exec Noah Samton on how "The Aftermath" filmed after Amanda and West's reunion deflections, why Ciara Miller is the show's future.

stories.headline: 'Toy Story 5' Eyes $275M Global Franchise Record Box Office Opening - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Toy Story 5' is looking at opening to the best ever for the franchise with a global opening of $275M. In North America, with $140M it will be the best start YTD at box office.

stories.headline: Jennifer Lopez Says She Had "Very Little Help" Raising Her and Marc Anthony's Twins - E! Online
stories.summary: Jennifer Lopez reflected on her "crazy" motherhood journey as her and ex Marc Anthony's 18-year-old twins Emme and Max graduate high school, sharing that she had "had very little help" in parenting.

stories.headline: Mystikal Sentenced to 20 Years in Prison After Pleading Guilty in Rape Case - Yahoo News UK
stories.summary: The Louisiana rapper entered a guilty plea to third-degree rape charges in March

stories.headline: How West Wilson tried to get Lindsay Hubbard, Kyle Cooke and Carl Radke fired from 'Summer House': report - Page Six
stories.summary: The axed cast member was speaking to producers behind his co-stars’ backs and giving his opinion on future casting.

stories.headline: Woman who underwent double mastectomy at 15 tells surgeon, 'You stole my girlhood' - Yahoo
stories.summary: Detransitioner Claire Abernathy accused surgeon Dr. Alan Dulin of performing a double mastectomy on her as a teenager without addressing her distress.
